top_signals.title: Gold Falls as Middle East Conflict Curbs Dip-Buying Momentum
top_signals.summary: Gold fell as the escalating conflict in the Middle East continued to push up energy prices, fueling bets the Federal Reserve will tighten monetary policy to contain inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI spending overshadows Alphabet and Tesla earnings
top_signals.summary: Wall Street’s biggest tech companies delivered another round of strong earnings on Wednesday, but the primary focus for investors is the growing cost of the artificial intelligence race. Alphabet and Tesla beat revenue expectations, yet their shares fell in after-hours trading after both companies signalled another year of heavy spending on AI infrastructure. Google-owner Alphabet [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
